SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

MemoryAddress.16bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits memory address

MemoryAddress.24bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 24 bits memory address

MemoryAddress.32bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 32 bits memory address

MemorySize.8bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 8 bits length for memory size

MemorySize.16bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits length for memory size

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

lists.0: TPMS ID registration warning buzzer off
lists.1: TPMS ID registration warning buzzer on

lists.0: TPMS run flat warning lamp off
lists.1: TPMS run flat warning lamp on
with Convenience function, Hazard and Horn version for AT
lists.2: with Convenience function, I-key buzzer version for AT
lists.3: with Convenience function,I-key and Out side buzzer version for AT
lists.4: with Convenience function, Hazard and Horn version for MT
lists.5: with Convenience function, I-key buzzer version for MT
lists.6: with Convenience function,I-key and Out side buzzer version for MT
